title: Flame Spear
description: This Pack Make Nethrite Looks Like Flame And soo cool If You Are Love Flame Tools This Is Spear That Crafted By Flames And Lava
body:
🔥 Flame Spear 🔥
A cool-looking spear with a flame-inspired design. Its glowing edges and fiery details give it a unique and stylish appearance, making it stand out in any loadout.

⚔️ Features:

Flame-themed design 🔥
Clean and stylish look
Fits perfectly with fire-based setups
Simple but eye-catching
